chunks.title: Jeremiah Imprisoned and Prophesies
chunks.reason: Narrative introduction of the siege context and Zedekiah's rebuke of Jeremiah.

chunks.title: The Purchase of the Field
chunks.reason: Complete narrative account of Hanamel's arrival and the legal purchase of the field.

chunks.title: Jeremiah's Prayer of Confusion
chunks.reason: A coherent prayer where Jeremiah reflects on God's power and questions the purchase amidst the siege.

chunks.title: God's Response and Judgment
chunks.reason: Divine oracle explaining the reason for judgment and asserting God's sovereignty.

chunks.title: Promise of Restoration
chunks.reason: Prophetic oracle promising the return of the people and the resumption of land transactions.
